entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system, referred to as V

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Company for which pricing decisions are being made

entities.name: Pricing Triangle Model
entities.context: Three-legged mental model for pricing: job descriptions, seats, time

entities.name: Bounded Variable Principle
entities.context: Decision to avoid unlimited offers that expose company to unbounded costs

entities.name: Job Descriptions
entities.context: One leg of the pricing triangle; volume metric in pricing model

entities.name: Seats
entities.context: One leg of the pricing triangle; user count metric in pricing model

entities.name: Time
entities.context: One leg of the pricing triangle; default bounding mechanism for pricing

relationships.context: V is making strategic pricing decisions for Careerspan
Adopted as core mental model for pricing decisions
Strategic decision to avoid unlimited offers
Job descriptions is one of the three legs of the triangle
Seats is one of the three legs of the triangle
Time is one of the three legs of the triangle
Principle enforces that at least one triangle leg must be bounded
Company uses this model to structure pricing offers
